name: developer
description: Meta-node that authors new node packages at runtime. Writes code + tests in nodes/_dynamic/<slug>/, builds them, the framework's auto-scanner registers the type, and this node then auto-spawns one live instance. Iterates on framework feedback (types.validation_failed) up to max_attempts.

default_subscriptions.description: Author a brand-new node from a natural-language description. Payload: text describing what the node should do.
Improve an existing authored node. Payload (JSON in content or metadata): {slug, request}. Re-runs the CLI on that workspace with a 'read what's there, change this' prompt.
Request a snapshot of every authored workspace under nodes/_dynamic/ (registered or not). Reply on dev.workspaces.
Request the file tree of one workspace. Payload: {slug}. Reply on dev.files.
Request the catalogue of available code-authoring CLIs (claude, codex, ...). Reply on dev.cli.available.
Framework feedback when a workspace this node authored failed validation. Used to iterate on the failing build.
Framework confirmation that an authored workspace was registered as a new node type. Triggers auto-spawn of one live instance.
Framework confirmation that an authored workspace's spec changed and was re-registered.
